caption: The video features a man sitting in what appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with some text on it. The man is engaged in a conversation or recording a podcast, as he speaks into a microphone while gesturing with his hand. The setting includes framed photographs on the wall behind him, adding a personal touch to the environment. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional setup, likely for a talk show or podcast recording titled "Boss Talk 101," as indicated by the logo in the bottom right corner.
